title: pedicularis plicata subsp. apiculata
intro: Pedicularis plicata subsp. apiculata, also known as the mountain lousewort or western lousewort, is a plant species within the Pedicularis genus. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pedicularis plicata subsp. apiculata include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
